description: Defines a custom Flutter widget named OceanScaffold that extends StatelessWidget. It provides a scaffold layout with customizable app bar, body, drawer, actions, and floating action button, along with gradient background styling.

classes.name: OceanScaffold
classes.description: A customizable scaffold widget with styled app bar and background gradient. It simplifies layout structure for Flutter applications that besoin modular and styled screens.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds the widget tree for OceanScaffold, creating a Scaffold with gradient background, app bar, and safe area padding.
